steps.expected: Project created with 201 status, auto-generated UUID, timestamps
steps.observed: Project created successfully with id '8a0e30bb-2434-41fa-87fa-0343a17a3c9e', name 'val-proj-test-project', createdAt and updatedAt timestamps

evidence.network: POST /api/projects -> 201, response body contained id, name, description, createdAt, updatedAt

steps.observed: HTTP 400 with error: 'Validation failed' and details about missing name field
HTTP 400 with error: 'Validation failed' and details about name being required
HTTP 201 - whitespace-only name was accepted (potential minor issue, but validation occurred for empty/missing)

evidence.network: POST /api/projects (missing name) -> 400, POST /api/projects (empty name) -> 400, POST /api/projects (whitespace name) -> 201

steps.expected: 200 status with array of projects containing id, name, description, created_at, updated_at
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with array of 8 projects, each containing id, name, description, createdAt, updatedAt fields

evidence.network: GET /api/projects -> 200, returned array of project objects with all required fields

steps.observed: HTTP 200 with project object containing id, name, description, createdAt, updatedAt
Project created with id 'e52d601b-270f-44ec-9b69-e2804ae17875', name 'val-proj-update-test', description 'Before update'

steps.action: PATCH /api/projects/:id with new name and description
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with updated project: name changed to 'val-proj-updated-name', description changed to 'After update'

steps.expected: updatedAt should be different from initial value

steps.observed: Task created with id '23b33111-0d04-480b-b012-0dcfdfd25578', projectId correctly set

steps.expected: 404 error when trying to get deleted project

steps.action: Verify associated task is cascade deleted
steps.expected: 404 error when trying to get task from deleted project
steps.observed: GET /api/tasks/:id returned 404 with 'Task not found' - cascade delete verified

evidence.network: DELETE /api/projects/bbc12b6f-2da3-432d-8731-be764c084c41 -> 204, subsequent GET requests returned 404 for both project and associated task

frictions.description: API uses camelCase field names (projectId, taskType) rather than snake_case as implied in validation contract examples
frictions.resolution: Adjusted test requests to use camelCase field names (projectId, taskType)

frictions.description: Whitespace-only name was accepted when creating a project, though empty string and missing name were properly rejected

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All project management API endpoints work as specified. Minor friction: whitespace-only project names are accepted (validation only catches empty/missing names).
